title: Short title
doc_html:
PART IV.  WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT

AND TRAINING LAW

§2331.  Short title

This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Workforce Development and Training Law".

Acts 1995, No. 483, §1.
doc_text:
PART IV.  WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT
AND TRAINING LAW
§2331.  Short title
This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Workforce Development and Training Law".
Acts 1995, No. 483, §1.
